mapper.insert: INSERT INTO saved_code (room_id, problem_framework_id, user_id, code_role, file_type, file_path, code, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{problemFrameworkId}, #{userId}, #{codeRole}, #{fileType}, #{filePath}, #{code}, NOW(), NOW(), 'F') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE code = VALUES(code), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
